requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard within the TIS Safety Standard (IEC 62471 basis)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——TIS 安全标准内的蓝光危害（IEC 62471 基础）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——TIS 安全標準內的藍光危害（IEC 62471 基礎）

summary.en: In Thailand, photobiological safety (blue light hazard) for LED lamps is addressed through the IEC 62471-based photobiological-safety provisions embedded in the applicable mandatory TIS lamp safety standard (such as the LED self-ballasted lamp safety standard, e.g. the TIS standard adopting IEC 62560 / IEC 62471 content), rather than through a standalone consumer label like the EU blue light hazard class. The TIS safety standard requires the lamp to fall within an acceptable photobiological risk group (commonly RG0 / RG1 / RG2 under the IEC 62471 framework), with risk groups above the permitted level requiring marking, warnings, or being non-compliant for general consumer use. Assessment is part of the TISI conformity evaluation conducted by a TISI-recognised laboratory. Confirm the exact TIS standard number and edition, and its photobiological clauses, for the specific lamp type.
summary.zh: 在泰国，LED 灯的光生物安全（蓝光危害）通过适用的强制性 TIS 灯安全标准中嵌入的、基于 IEC 62471 的光生物安全条款管理（如 LED 自镇流灯安全标准，例如采用 IEC 62560 / IEC 62471 内容的 TIS 标准），而非如欧盟蓝光危害等级那样的独立消费者标签。TIS 安全标准要求灯具落在可接受的光生物危险组别内（通常为 IEC 62471 框架下的 RG0 / RG1 / RG2），超过允许等级的危险组别须加贴标记、警告，或对一般消费用途判为不合规。评估属于 TISI 合格评定的一部分，由 TISI 认可实验室进行。请就具体灯型确认现行 TIS 标准编号、版本及其光生物条款。
summary.zht: 在泰國，LED 燈的光生物安全（藍光危害）通過適用的強制性 TIS 燈安全標準中嵌入的、基於 IEC 62471 的光生物安全條款管理（如 LED 自鎮流燈安全標準，例如採用 IEC 62560 / IEC 62471 內容的 TIS 標準），而非如歐盟藍光危害等級那樣的獨立消費者標籤。TIS 安全標準要求燈具落在可接受的光生物危險組別內（通常為 IEC 62471 框架下的 RG0 / RG1 / RG2），超過允許等級的危險組別須加貼標記、警告，或對一般消費用途判為不合規。評估屬於 TISI 合格評定的一部分，由 TISI 認可實驗室進行。請就具體燈型確認現行 TIS 標準編號、版本及其光生物條款。

standards_or_laws: Mandatory TIS lamp safety standard with embedded IEC 62471-based photobiological safety provisions (TISI, Ministry of Industry)
IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (risk group classification, as referenced by the TIS standard)

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006. GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market; some photobiological-safety requirements are also reflected within GB 7000-series and lamp safety standards used for CCC. Enforcement is less prescriptive for residential luminaires than where photobiological clauses are embedded directly in a mandatory Thai TIS lamp safety standard.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均为强制要求；部分光生物安全要求也体现在用于 CCC 的 GB 7000 系列及灯安全标准中。与光生物条款直接嵌入泰国强制性 TIS 灯安全标准的情形相比，中国对居民灯具的执行规定不够严格。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均為強制要求；部分光生物安全要求也體現在用於 CCC 的 GB 7000 系列及燈安全標準中。與光生物條款直接嵌入泰國強制性 TIS 燈安全標準的情形相比，中國對居民燈具的執行規定不夠嚴格。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, equivalent to IEC 62471:2006)

gap.en: Both Thailand and China derive photobiological risk classification from the IEC 62471 framework, so the technical method is shared. The gaps are: (1) in Thailand the photobiological provisions are embedded in the mandatory TIS lamp safety standard and assessed under the TIS licence, whereas CN GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and not routinely enforced for residential lamps; (2) CN CCC test reports are not automatically accepted for the Thai TIS evaluation — photobiological evidence should come from a TISI-recognised laboratory or an accepted pathway; (3) a product that was never formally risk-group assessed for the CN market will need that assessment documented for the TIS licence; (4) lamps exceeding the permitted risk group require marking/warnings or may be ineligible for general consumer sale in Thailand. Exporters should obtain or refresh an IEC 62471 risk-group assessment acceptable to TISI rather than relying on CN documentation.
gap.zh: 泰国与中国均以 IEC 62471 框架得出光生物危险分类，故技术方法共通。差距在于：（1）泰国的光生物条款嵌入强制性 TIS 灯安全标准并在 TIS 许可下评定，而中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性且对居民灯具不常执行；（2）中国 CCC 检测报告不自动被泰国 TIS 评定所接受——光生物证据应来自 TISI 认可实验室或经认可的路径；（3）从未为中国市场正式作过危险组别评估的产品，须为 TIS 许可补充该评估文件；（4）超过允许危险组别的灯具须加贴标记/警告，或在泰国可能不具备一般消费销售资格。出口商应取得或更新一份 TISI 可接受的 IEC 62471 危险组别评估，而非依赖中国文件。
gap.zht: 泰國與中國均以 IEC 62471 框架得出光生物危險分類，故技術方法共通。差距在於：（1）泰國的光生物條款嵌入強制性 TIS 燈安全標準並在 TIS 許可下評定，而中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性且對居民燈具不常執行；（2）中國 CCC 檢測報告不自動被泰國 TIS 評定所接受——光生物證據應來自 TISI 認可實驗室或經認可的路徑；（3）從未為中國市場正式作過危險組別評估的產品，須為 TIS 許可補充該評估文件；（4）超過允許危險組別的燈具須加貼標記/警告，或在泰國可能不具備一般消費銷售資格。出口商應取得或更新一份 TISI 可接受的 IEC 62471 危險組別評估，而非依賴中國文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (within the TIS safety standard) — photobiological / blue light hazard provisions are assessed as part of the mandatory TIS lamp safety certification; confirm the exact TIS standard and edition for the lamp type
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is not universally prescribed

source.publisher: TISI (Thai Industrial Standards Institute), Ministry of Industry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] In Thailand, blue light hazard is handled through the IEC 62471-based photobiological provisions embedded in the mandatory TIS lamp safety standard and assessed under the TIS licence, not through a standalone EU-style label. The technical method is shared with China's GB/T 20145, but CN recommended-standard or CCC documentation is not automatically accepted — exporters should secure a risk-group assessment acceptable to TISI. Lamps exceeding the permitted risk group require marking/warnings. Confirm the exact TIS standard number, edition, and photobiological clauses for the specific lamp type.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在泰国，蓝光危害通过强制性 TIS 灯安全标准中嵌入的、基于 IEC 62471 的光生物条款管理，并在 TIS 许可下评定，而非如欧盟式独立标签。技术方法与中国 GB/T 20145 共通，但中国推荐性标准或 CCC 文件不自动被接受——出口商应取得 TISI 可接受的危险组别评估。超过允许危险组别的灯具须加贴标记/警告。请就具体灯型确认 TIS 标准编号、版本及光生物条款。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在泰國，藍光危害通過強制性 TIS 燈安全標準中嵌入的、基於 IEC 62471 的光生物條款管理，並在 TIS 許可下評定，而非如歐盟式獨立標籤。技術方法與中國 GB/T 20145 共通，但中國推薦性標準或 CCC 文件不自動被接受——出口商應取得 TISI 可接受的危險組別評估。超過允許危險組別的燈具須加貼標記/警告。請就具體燈型確認 TIS 標準編號、版本及光生物條款。

requirement_topic.en: Risk-Group Marking and Consumer Warnings vs CN Practice
requirement_topic.zh: 危险组别标记与消费者警告 vs 中国实践
requirement_topic.zht: 危險組別標記與消費者警告 vs 中國實踐

summary.en: Where a TIS-certified LED lamp falls into a higher photobiological risk group (typically RG2 or above under the IEC 62471 framework adopted by the TIS standard), the product must carry the appropriate marking and consumer warnings, and certain risk groups are not acceptable for unrestricted general-lighting consumer use. Thailand does not require a separate EU-style blue light hazard class on the energy/consumer label, but the risk-group outcome is part of the TIS safety conformity and the product marking. Any required warning text and symbols must be presented in a way intelligible to Thai consumers (Thai language) alongside the TIS mark and importer/licence-holder identification.
summary.zh: 若经 TIS 认证的 LED 灯落入较高光生物危险组别（通常为 TIS 标准采用的 IEC 62471 框架下的 RG2 及以上），产品须加贴相应标记及消费者警告，且某些危险组别不被接受用于不受限的一般照明消费用途。泰国不要求在能效/消费者标签上单独标注欧盟式蓝光危害等级，但危险组别结果是 TIS 安全合格评定及产品标记的一部分。任何所需的警告文字及符号须以泰国消费者可理解的方式（泰文）呈现，并与 TIS 标志及进口商/许可证持有人标识一并标注。
summary.zht: 若經 TIS 認證的 LED 燈落入較高光生物危險組別（通常為 TIS 標準採用的 IEC 62471 框架下的 RG2 及以上），產品須加貼相應標記及消費者警告，且某些危險組別不被接受用於不受限的一般照明消費用途。泰國不要求在能效/消費者標籤上單獨標註歐盟式藍光危害等級，但危險組別結果是 TIS 安全合格評定及產品標記的一部分。任何所需的警告文字及符號須以泰國消費者可理解的方式（泰文）呈現，並與 TIS 標誌及進口商/許可證持有人標識一併標註。

standards_or_laws: Mandatory TIS lamp safety standard — risk-group marking and warning requirements (TISI, Ministry of Industry)
IEC 62471 risk group framework as referenced by the TIS standard

summary.en: China's GB/T 20145-2006 (equivalent to IEC 62471:2006) provides the risk-group framework but is a recommended standard, so risk-group marking and consumer warnings are not universally enforced for residential LED lamps in the CN market. CCC-related lamp safety standards may capture certain photobiological aspects, but there is no Chinese requirement to display a consumer-facing blue light class equivalent to a marketing label. CN-market packaging is in Chinese and would not satisfy Thai-language warning and marking expectations.
summary.zh: 中国 GB/T 20145-2006（等同 IEC 62471:2006）提供了危险组别框架，但为推荐性标准，故危险组别标记及消费者警告在中国市场对居民 LED 灯并非普遍执行。与 CCC 相关的灯安全标准可能涵盖部分光生物方面，但中国无相当于营销标签的、面向消费者的蓝光等级显示要求。中国市场包装为中文，不满足泰文警告及标记要求。
summary.zht: 中國 GB/T 20145-2006（等同 IEC 62471:2006）提供了危險組別框架，但為推薦性標準，故危險組別標記及消費者警告在中國市場對居民 LED 燈並非普遍執行。與 CCC 相關的燈安全標準可能涵蓋部分光生物方面，但中國無相當於營銷標籤的、面向消費者的藍光等級顯示要求。中國市場包裝為中文，不滿足泰文警告及標記要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard; risk-group marking not universally enforced)

gap.en: The gap is one of enforcement and presentation rather than technical method. In Thailand the risk-group outcome feeds directly into mandatory TIS marking and consumer warnings, and higher risk groups can restrict or bar general consumer sale; in China GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and risk-group marking is not routinely required for residential lamps. For the Thai market the exporter must: (1) ensure the risk-group assessment is documented under the TIS evaluation; (2) add any required warning markings/symbols and present them in Thai; (3) confirm the product's risk group is acceptable for its intended consumer use. CN-market documentation and Chinese-language packaging do not satisfy these Thai marking and warning requirements and must be redone for Thailand.
gap.zh: 差距在于执行与呈现，而非技术方法。在泰国，危险组别结果直接进入强制性 TIS 标记及消费者警告，较高危险组别可限制或禁止一般消费销售；在中国，GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性，危险组别标记对居民灯具不常要求。就泰国市场，出口商须：（1）确保危险组别评估在 TIS 评定下记录在案；（2）添加任何所需的警告标记/符号并以泰文呈现；（3）确认产品危险组别对其拟定消费用途可接受。中国市场文件及中文包装不满足上述泰国标记及警告要求，须为泰国重做。
gap.zht: 差距在於執行與呈現，而非技術方法。在泰國，危險組別結果直接進入強制性 TIS 標記及消費者警告，較高危險組別可限制或禁止一般消費銷售；在中國，GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性，危險組別標記對居民燈具不常要求。就泰國市場，出口商須：（1）確保危險組別評估在 TIS 評定下記錄在案；（2）添加任何所需的警告標記/符號並以泰文呈現；（3）確認產品危險組別對其擬定消費用途可接受。中國市場文件及中文包裝不滿足上述泰國標記及警告要求，須為泰國重做。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (within the TIS safety standard) — risk-group marking and consumer warnings apply where the lamp falls into a higher photobiological risk group; presented in Thai alongside the TIS mark
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended / not universally enforced — GB/T 20145-2006 risk-group marking is not routinely required for residential LED lamps in China

source.publisher: TISI (Thai Industrial Standards Institute), Ministry of Industry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Thailand handles photobiological risk-group marking and consumer warnings inside the mandatory TIS lamp safety standard rather than as a standalone label; higher risk groups can restrict general consumer sale and require Thai-language warnings alongside the TIS mark. China's GB/T 20145 risk-group marking is recommended-only and not routinely enforced for residential lamps, and Chinese-language packaging does not satisfy Thai requirements. Exporters must document the risk-group assessment under the TIS evaluation and produce Thai-language marking and warnings.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 泰国将光生物危险组别标记及消费者警告纳入强制性 TIS 灯安全标准内处理，而非独立标签；较高危险组别可限制一般消费销售，并须连同 TIS 标志以泰文标注警告。中国 GB/T 20145 危险组别标记仅为推荐性，对居民灯具不常执行，中文包装亦不满足泰国要求。出口商须在 TIS 评定下记录危险组别评估，并制作泰文标记及警告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 泰國將光生物危險組別標記及消費者警告納入強制性 TIS 燈安全標準內處理，而非獨立標籤；較高危險組別可限制一般消費銷售，並須連同 TIS 標誌以泰文標註警告。中國 GB/T 20145 危險組別標記僅為推薦性，對居民燈具不常執行，中文包裝亦不滿足泰國要求。出口商須在 TIS 評定下記錄危險組別評估，並製作泰文標記及警告。
